summary: Tested Crew Management & Booking Delta features. Fixed 3 backend bugs (Conversation field names, current_participants calculation, BookingParticipant relationship). All 3 new endpoints working. Frontend components verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: bookings.py line 884-893 - Conversation model uses participant_one_id/participant_two_id, not participant_1_id/participant_2_id
Fixed: bookings.py line 803 - Booking model has no current_participants attribute, must calculate from participants list
Fixed: bookings.py line 851 - BookingParticipant relationship is 'participant' not 'user'
Fixed: posts.py - Added session log fields (is_session_log, session_invite_open, session_spots_left, session_price_per_person, booking_id) to PostResponse
Fixed: posts.py - Made media_url Optional for session log posts that have no media
seed_data_creation: Created test booking (ID: e1bb4aaa-f991-4cd9-92dd-88ce82a8bc83) and session log post (ID: 1bd555bf-f3a8-4e77-b8ce-f8efde979d8f)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Crew Management & Booking Delta features verified: 1) Scheduled Tab shows pinned 'Book a Session' CTA with camera icon and 'Book Now' button, 2) Empty state shows 'No Scheduled Bookings Yet', 3) SessionActionDrawer component has all action buttons (Invite Crew, Split Payment when crew>1, Share to Feed, Modify Time, Cancel with refund policy), 4) Backend endpoints POST /api/bookings/{id}/share-to-feed, send-split-requests, request-join all working, 5) Session log posts include is_session_log, session_invite_open, session_spots_left, session_price_per_person fields for SessionJoinCard

scheduled_tab_book_session_cta.notes: Pinned at top with camera icon and 'Book Now' button

scheduled_tab_empty_state.notes: Shows 'No Scheduled Bookings Yet' with 'Browse Photographers' button

session_action_drawer.notes: Component has all action buttons: Invite Crew, Split Payment (when crew>1), Share to Feed, Modify Time, Cancel with refund policy

share_to_feed_endpoint.notes: POST /api/bookings/{id}/share-to-feed creates session log post with is_session_log=true

send_split_requests_endpoint.notes: POST /api/bookings/{id}/send-split-requests sends payment requests to crew via Messages

request_join_endpoint.notes: POST /api/bookings/{id}/request-join adds pending participant and notifies captain

session_join_card.notes: SessionJoinCard renders on posts where is_session_log=true AND session_invite_open=true AND session_spots_left>0

bugs_fixed.fix: Calculate from participants list: len([p for p in booking.participants if p.status in ['pending', 'confirmed']])
Added is_session_log, session_invite_open, session_spots_left, session_price_per_person, booking_id fields

bugs_fixed.issue: media_url required but session log posts have no media
